channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The K-shaped economic divide might be narrowing
item.description: For years, the economy has appeared K-shaped. New evidence suggests some of that divide is beginning to close. The wage-growth gap between lower-...

item.title: AIPAC sets sights on a former Democratic congresswoman it helped unseat in 2026
item.description: AIPAC thought it had ended Cori Bush's career two years ago, but now it is investing heavily to prevent her return.

item.title: Exclusive: Platner tells staff he will exit Senate race on Monday
item.description: Graham Platner privately informed his staff that he plans to file paperwork to end his Senate campaign by Monday's deadline.

item.title: Microsoft's AI expansion clashes with its climate targets
item.description: Microsoft's latest environmental report highlights the conflict between its push for AI infrastructure and its long-term climate goals.
